_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Record and document activities during cyberspace operations.
reference_document_element_description: Maintain Records of Processing Activities, including processing purposes, data categories, recipient categories, transfer records, retention periods, and technical and organizational security measures descriptions.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-021 (AI, cosine: 0.442), DQ-T-016 (DQ, cosine: 0.430).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.534). Shared vocabulary: [activities]. DCWF-only terms [cyberspace, document, operations, record] vs WIDAI-only terms [categories, data, descriptions, maintain, measures, organizational] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.890, R=0.844). P exceeds R by 0.046 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Record and document activities during cyberspace operations." and "Maintain Records of Processing Activities, including processing purposes, data c" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.503 ≈ STS 0.534 (gap 0.031). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [activities] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.3%. Shared tokens: [activities]. DCWF-only: [cyberspace, document, operations, record]. WIDAI-only: [categories, data, descriptions, maintain, measures, organizational].
